narrative:
Precinct 0033 Van Buren North (precinct in Shelby County) has 669 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.6 percentage points.
